items.subject: Open and closed models are on different exponentials
items.rationale: Nathan Lambert analyzes divergent scaling trajectories of open vs closed models. Directly relevant to open-source AI and model ecosystem wiki coverage.

items.subject: Import AI 459: AI oversight is difficult; scaling laws for protein folding models; and pricing the extinction risk
items.rationale: Jack Clark's Import AI covers AI oversight challenges, scaling laws for scientific models, and extinction risk pricing. Multiple topics map to wiki concept areas (AI safety, scaling laws).

items.subject: How I AI: Codex Goals explained & Claude Opus 4.8 review & Building an iPhone app with zero technical skills
items.rationale: Covers OpenAI Codex Goals (coding agent feature) and Claude Opus 4.8 review. Directly relevant to coding agents and developer tooling wiki topics. Claude Opus 4.8 is a new model version to track.

items.subject: Why Video Agent models are next — Ethan He, xAI Grok Imagine Lead
items.rationale: swyx/Latent Space podcast on video agent models with xAI's Grok Imagine Lead. Video agents are an emerging frontier — high relevance to AI agents and multimodal models wiki coverage. xAI/Grok entity tracking.

items.subject: MiniMax M3 Opens Frontier Agents
items.rationale: MiniMax M3 launch related to frontier agent capabilities. MiniMax is a notable Chinese AI lab. New model release with agent focus — critical for model tracking and AI agents wiki coverage.

items.subject: [AINews] NVIDIA Cosmos 3, Nemotron 3 Ultra, and RTX Spark
items.rationale: Major NVIDIA announcements: Cosmos 3 (world model/robotics), Nemotron 3 Ultra (enterprise LLM), RTX Spark (edge AI hardware). Covers inference infrastructure, models, and hardware — all core wiki topics.

recommended_actions: Create/update NVIDIA entity page for Cosmos 3, Nemotron 3 Ultra, RTX Spark announcements
Create/update MiniMax entity page for M3 frontier agent model
Create/update xAI entity page and video agents concept page from swyx podcast
Enrich Claude model page with Opus 4.8 details
